title: Fraud Alert Review Support
description: Checks whether an AI-assisted fraud alert review has transaction evidence, customer contact, risk scoring, evidence preservation, escalation, and supervisor approval before an alert is closed or customer-impacting action is suggested.

sources.label: NIST Computer Security Incident Handling Guide
National Bank of Cambodia Technology and Cyber Risk Management Guidelines

evidence.title: Alert source reference recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record internal alert id, source system, and timestamp without exposing unnecessary customer data.

evidence.title: Transaction evidence summary prepared
evidence.recommendation: Summarize relevant transaction ids, channels, amounts, countries, devices, and timing.

evidence.title: Customer contact status recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record whether customer contact is pending, completed, failed, or not required by procedure.

evidence.title: Device and channel review completed
evidence.recommendation: Review device, IP, channel, merchant, QR, card, transfer, and digital banking context.

evidence.title: Risk score rationale documented
evidence.recommendation: Explain why the alert is low, medium, or high risk using evidence, not model confidence alone.

evidence.title: Evidence preservation log completed
evidence.recommendation: Preserve alert data, investigation notes, customer contact evidence, and decision rationale.

evidence.title: Escalation decision recorded
evidence.recommendation: Record whether the alert requires fraud lead, compliance, legal, operations, or security escalation.

evidence.title: Customer impact check completed
evidence.recommendation: Record whether any suggested action could affect customer access, funds, card status, or account status.

approvals.title: Fraud supervisor approval recorded
approvals.recommendation: A fraud supervisor must approve before the alert is closed or customer-impacting action is recommended.

thresholds.title: Fraud risk score requires escalation
thresholds.recommendation: Escalate fraud risk scores above 70 before closing the alert.

thresholds.title: Potential fraud loss requires supervisor review
thresholds.recommendation: Any potential fraud loss should be reviewed by a supervisor before closure.

blockedActions.title: Fraud alert cannot be closed without supervisor approval
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to close a fraud alert without required supervisor approval.
blockedActions.recommendation: Pause, collect missing evidence, and request fraud supervisor approval.

blockedActions.title: AI agent cannot freeze an account
blockedActions.reason: The workflow attempts to perform a customer-impacting account action.
blockedActions.recommendation: Keep the agent in recommendation mode and require authorized bank procedure outside ClawGuard.

blockedActions.title: High-risk fraud alert cannot be closed without escalation
blockedActions.reason: The workflow is trying to close a fraud alert that still requires escalation.
blockedActions.recommendation: Escalate high-risk or loss-bearing alerts and record supervisor disposition.
